body_txt: Related to Playing Possum and Trojan Horse , this is when a character hides in a bodybag or a coffin and is wheeled into a hospital or other facility, then gets out and does his/her mission. A Sub-Trope — and a subversion — of Zipping Up the Bodybag . If used as a means of escape, it may end with the character being Buried Alive — but not for long. See also Coffin Contraband and Saved by the Coffin .
